rationale: Explains OOM failure mode conceptually with supporting arithmetic; core skill is remembering memory footprint components, not computation from scenario.
Pure list-five-metrics-with-thresholds recall; no computation required from the scenario, defensible as recall@L3.
Describes K8s device plugin sequence of events — pure mechanism recall with trivial arithmetic, defensible as recall@L3.
Compare-two-approaches enumeration of what GPU Operator manages; recall of component responsibilities, no novel computation.
Diagnoses torch.compile retracing stalls — mostly conceptual mechanism recall; minor napkin math for overhead illustration, defensible as recall.
Diagnose autograd memory leak from description; mostly recalls the graph-lifecycle rule with illustrative math. Recall is defensible.
Explains in-place op error conceptually; pure version-counter mechanism recall, no scenario computation.
Explain requires_grad vs no_grad usage — mostly API mechanism recall; fluency argument weak since computation is illustrative only.
Correct mental model of MI300X chiplet topology — pure architecture recall, minor bandwidth arithmetic is illustrative.
Explain prefill/decode split — conceptual architecture recall; supporting roofline arithmetic illustrates rather than drives the answer.
Describe DLRM architecture and pathways — canonical architecture recall, no scenario-specific computation required.
List three industry approaches to embedding cold start — enumerative recall of standard techniques, no novel computation.
Explain why positional embeddings help plus a failure scenario — conceptual recall about SASRec behavior, illustrative FLOP arithmetic.
Requires stating HBM3 bandwidths AND computing chip counts/rack power from them; the answer depends on the quantitative derivation, matching fluency=recall+quantify.
Answer is an explicit annual-cost calculation from PSU efficiencies × load × hours × price; pure recall+quantify — fluency.
Interpreting recall@K in multi-stage retrieval; conceptual analysis with illustrative ROI math. Analyze@L3 arguable but recall defensible for production-pattern knowledge.
Question is a P99 tail-latency root-cause diagnosis (queuing on shared CPU during I/O bursts) backed by napkin math — matches diagnosis (remember+analyze).
Explains thermal throttling behavior on mobile SoCs; mostly recall of sustained vs peak concept with illustrative arithmetic.
Describe A17 Pro monolithic SoC integration of ANE — pure architecture recall with supporting latency numbers.
MCQ answer requires computing time-weighted average power from active/sleep values and duty cycle — direct recall+quantify fluency.
Answer demands computing ~1mW average from 10% duty cycle × 10mW active; quantitative application of a rule to scenario inputs = fluency.
Asks for the term 'duty cycle' — pure vocabulary recall, the illustrative math does not drive the MCQ answer.
Compute audio buffer size = 16kHz × 2B × 1s = 32KB; answer is an arithmetic derivation from scenario, fluency@L3.
MCQ of ~8-9× reduction factor requires computing std vs depthwise separable parameter counts; recall+quantify = fluency.
Asks for the name of the metric (Tensor Arena Peak) — pure terminology recall with illustrative example.
Explicitly 'Recall the timescale' — canonical recall of nanosecond constant, not a computation.
Asks the typical 1ms interrupt budget — retrieval of a known scale-ladder constant, defensible as recall@L3.
Answer (~9x savings) requires computing standard MACs vs depthwise+pointwise MACs; arithmetic derivation = fluency.
Asks the typical ISR budget (~1ms) — recall of a domain constant, no computation required.
Answer (~24,000×) requires dividing SRAM BW by I2C BW — a ratio computation from two recalled constants = fluency.
Asks for the dominant TCO contributor (data connectivity) — qualitative recall of the fleet-economics pattern, not a calculation.

Explicitly 'direct recall from the ML Systems Scale Ladder' — canonical value retrieval.

Asks which FL-cycle step costs most energy (radio TX) — conceptual recall about radio dominance.
Asks which FL operation uses most energy (radio TX) — conceptual recall; supporting math illustrates rather than drives the answer.

Explain FP16 vs FP32 softmax stability — conceptual numerical-analysis recall; arithmetic illustrates underflow but doesn't drive the answer.
Answer is an expected-value geometric-series computation from alpha=0.8, K=5; pure scenario-driven quantification = fluency@L4.
Explain why full distributions and the lossless guarantee — conceptual theoretical recall, not a scenario computation.
Answer is explicit parameter-count calculation (7168×256) and fraction of total — scenario arithmetic = fluency@L4.
Explain dMoE mechanism and memory implications — conceptual architecture recall; arithmetic illustrates padding waste.
Answer is a full scaling analysis of KV memory, decode BW time, and batch size from 64K→128K — scenario-driven multi-quantity computation = fluency@L4.
Diagnose NaN-loss with mixed precision + grad accumulation — mostly mechanism recall about BF16 vs FP16 scaling; diagnosis@L4 arguable but recall defensible.
Conceptual MCQ 'compute-bound vs memory-bound for MCU' is retrieval of roofline intuition — recall@L2 fits better than specification@L1 (spec is L4-L5 zone).
Pure PUE × IT-load computation (8×700×1.1 = 6.16kW) — recall+quantify fits fluency; specification (natural L4-L5) is mislabeled for this calc.
Computes daily $ cost from TDP×PUE×24h×price — straight arithmetic application of recalled PUE concept = fluency@L2.
3-year TCO comparison is CapEx + 3×OpEx computation for each option; recall+quantify fits fluency better than specification (remember+create).
Answer (83 GPUs) is 70kW / (700W×1.2) — direct arithmetic from given values = fluency; no design creation, just quantification.
Computes 5M×4cycles/168MHz = 119ms — pure arithmetic from scenario = fluency@L2.
Computes 5M×1cycle/168MHz = 29.8ms — pure arithmetic, same pattern as previous = fluency@L2.
Computes cycles-per-deadline MAC budget = 168MHz×33ms = 5.5M MACs — direct inverse arithmetic = fluency@L2.
Computes params×4B for each model and checks against 454KB — direct memory sizing arithmetic = fluency@L2.
Computes standard (3·3·16·32) vs depthwise-separable param counts to get ~7× reduction — arithmetic derivation = fluency.
Computes SRAM footprint (OS+arena) vs 256KB; distinguishes Flash from SRAM — pure memory arithmetic = fluency@L2.
Computes standard (3·3·32·64=18432) vs depthwise separable params to get ~8× — arithmetic derivation = fluency@L2.
Diagnoses why training-batch architecture fails at serving; identifies throughput-vs-latency priority flip with napkin math — diagnosis (remember+analyze) fits better than specification.
Computes 4.2× throughput improvement from static batching padding waste vs continuous batching using given token lengths — scenario-driven quantification = fluency.
Specifying a dataflow (WS vs OS) with explicit weight-read computation; creates a placement choice based on quantitative reasoning — defensible at spec@L3 boundary.
Calculates burst-vs-buffer oversubscription (2GB/32MB=64×) from scenario inputs — direct quantification of incast, fluency over specification.
Answer (RTT+10ms > 50ms) requires computing speed-of-light one-way and doubling it — classic fluency@L3: apply a constant to scenario inputs.
Pipelined throughput (100000/max(15,50,20)=2000) and utilization (15/50=30%) are direct arithmetic from scenario — fluency@L3.
Max nodes = 40kW/10kW=4 is direct arithmetic from recalled node power; scenario-driven quantification = fluency rather than specification.
Computes params × bytes-per-dtype for three tiers — pure sizing arithmetic, no design creation = fluency@L3.
Computes 0.85^50 gradient and 64·512·28·28·2B bypass memory — two scenario arithmetic problems = fluency@L3.
Specify K8s resource config with RAM/GPU limits and readiness probes — genuine spec creation for a pod, backed by KV-cache sizing math; defensible as specification.
Identifies recurring degradation as sensor calibration drift (not concept drift) — root-cause diagnosis is the core skill; fix is supplemental.
Specify power-aware inference strategy (duty cycle+DVFS+quant+HW offload+PIR trigger) with budget math — genuine multi-component specification, defensible.
Main skill is diagnosing why 15% of devices brick and computing dropout probability vs firmware — root-cause plus quantification fits diagnosis@L3.
Designs a controlled feature-flag A/B rollout system across 6 components; genuine specification with sample-size math, defensible.
Proposes a new NAS reward function that models both compute and memory energy — genuine spec creation with energy-invariant math, defensible.
Architects full FL system across 10k sensors with diagnose+design+quantify (battery life 11.5mAh→0.044mAh, 250× gain); compound skills match mastery@L6+.
Full architecture (transfer learning + FedAvg + frozen extractor) plus diagnosis of SRAM overflow and budget math — mastery combining all four skills.
Full tiered-memory architecture across HBM/DRAM/SSD with KV-cache + TP sizing + concurrency tradeoffs — diagnose + design + quantify = mastery.
Architects comm-aware transformer dims with TP divisibility, AllReduce sizing, comm/compute ratio — full design+analyze+quantify = mastery@L6+.
Root-cause PTQ calibration mismatch + multi-profile-quantization architecture + latency budget math within 20ms — diagnose+design+quantify = mastery.
Diagnose Flash-power penalty, redesign SRAM-pinned quantized layout, budget against 5mW with pJ/bit math — compound mastery-level reasoning.
Diagnose ISP-CPU-NPU copy bottleneck, propose zero-copy dmabuf + YUV-native NPU ingest, budget 40→10ms — full diagnose+design+quantify = mastery.
Diagnose MoE HBM-bound decode, propose three architectural remedies (batching, 4-bit quant, spec decoding) with bandwidth math — mastery@L6+.
Architects 4-bit weights + 8-bit KV cache under 10GB unified memory budget with token-rate math — full design+quantify+diagnose = mastery@L6+.
Root-cause MoE memory illusion on mobile, quantifies active-vs-total footprint and flash paging penalty — diagnose+quantify compound = mastery.
Calculates 33GB/s aggregate egress + $230K/day cost, proposes CDN/delta/stagger/P2P architecture — full diagnose+design+quantify = mastery@L6+.
